title: Intuitive Appoints Sreelakshmi Kolli to its Board of Directors

title: Intuitive Surgical shares tumble on disappointing 3Q revenue
text: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) shares dropped nearly 8% in extended trading Thursday after the company's quarterly revenue fell short of expectations.  The surgical robotics company posted third-quarter revenue of $1.74 billion, up from $1.56 billion a year earlier but slightly short of the analyst consensus of $1.77 billion.
